category_title: Students with or at risk for EBD exhibiting off-task, disruptive, or frustrated behaviors
scenario_title: Core reading instruction and comprehension tasks
minimal_context: The student is reading a connected text and completing a vocabulary worksheet during core reading instruction.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please read the next paragraph of the connected text out loud, and then we will fill out the worksheet for the new words.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stares at the page, appearing frustrated and confused) I don't know these words. This doesn't make any sense.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just do your best to read the text.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the book away) No, it's stupid. (Starts drawing on the desk instead of reading)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to finish reading. Please look back at your book.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns around in the chair, completely off task, and starts poking the student at the next desk) Hey, look at this.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please read the next paragraph of the connected text out loud, and then we will fill out the worksheet for the new words.

STUDENT: (Stares at the page, appearing frustrated and confused) I don't know these words. This doesn't make any sense.

TUTOR: Just do your best to read the text.

STUDENT: (Pushes the book away) No, it's stupid. (Starts drawing on the desk instead of reading)

TUTOR: We need to finish reading. Please look back at your book.

STUDENT: (Turns around in the chair, completely off task, and starts poking the student at the next desk) Hey, look at this.

task.content: Reading connected text and working with new words

context.environment: General education classrooms and special education classrooms
context.social_setting: Core reading instruction, one-to-one intervention sessions, or peer tutoring

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When experiencing comprehension difficulties during reading instruction
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Performs off task behavior, interferes with others, performs disruptive behavior, engages in non-instructional activities
related_quotes: off task up to 80% of the time.

behavior_patterns.condition: During core reading instruction in general education classrooms
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Performs disruptive behavior, engages in non-instructional activities, interferes with others
